response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'ブラックロックシューター' (Black Rock Shooter) via on-screen text and searched for its lyrics. 2. Identified 'Beyond the way' via on-screen text and credits (lyrics by q*Left, music by Giga) and searched for its lyrics. 3. Confirmed performers as Kazama Iroha and guests based on the live concert hashtag #風真いろは生誕LIVE2025. 4. Mapped scenes based on song start/end times in the video.
response.global_summary: A concert clip featuring two songs: 'Black Rock Shooter' and 'Beyond the way', performed by Kazama Iroha with various guests in a live stage setting.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs 'Black Rock Shooter'. Text in top-left corner identifies the song.
scenes.song_title: ブラックロックシューター
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ブラックロックシューター 何処へ行ったの？ 聞こえますか？
あとどれだけ叫べばいいのだろう？
あとどれだけ泣けばいいのだろう？
もうやめて わたしはもう走れない
いつか夢見た世界が閉じる
真っ暗で明かりもない 崩れかけたこの道で
あるはずもないあの時の希望が見えた気がした
どうして
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Black Rock Shooter, where did you go? Can you hear me?
How much longer do I have to keep screaming?
How much longer do I have to keep crying?
Stop it, I can't run anymore
The world I dreamed of is closing
In this pitch-black, lightless, crumbling road
I felt like I saw a glimpse of that hope from back then
Why?

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs 'Beyond the way'. Text in top-left and on-screen credits identify the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
息つまるばかりで
温い退屈な夜道で (Mellow, mellow, mellow)
ルールは無視で行きたいね (ha-ha)
So burn, my burn, my heart (Uh)
悟られそう (uh)
可か不可 get down now (Uh)
あーあ
I know the way
願ってるばっかじゃ叶わない
めちゃくちゃにされたって 変わらない
まあね 喰らえ 覚醒 Find the way
待ってライトあびる感覚
甘い罠 見当違い
disも聞き飽きたわ そりゃね
いけるところまで Take me higher どう？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Stifled, in this lukewarm, boring night road (Mellow, mellow, mellow)
Rules, I want to ignore them, ha-ha
So burn, my burn, my heart (Uh)
It looks like it will be found out (uh)
Pass or fail, get down now (Uh)
Ah, ah
I know the way, I'm just wishing it won't come true
Even if it's messed up, it won't change, well
Eat it, awakening, find the way
Waiting, the feeling of being in the spotlight
Sweet traps, wrong estimation
I'm tired of hearing the disses, that's right
Go as far as I can, Take me higher, how about it?
